predictions.source_quote: We expect a GDP growth rate of 2.0% for 2022 and 0.7% for 2023.
We expect a GDP growth rate of 2.0% for 2022 and 0.7% for 2023.
A formal recession in 2023 remains a 30%-50% possibility, given our expectations that GDP growth in the first half of the year is close to zero.
A formal recession in 2023 remains a 30%-50% possibility, given our expectations that GDP growth in the first half of the year is close to zero.
We now expect the housing component of the Consumer Price Index to increase 7% in 2023, compared with 5.75% previously.
Combining these factors with monetary policy tightening, we expect inflation to average just 1.8% over 2023-26.
